conj.statement: All tiers agree digital tools must preserve *temporal horizon* (past/future projection). Evidence: Maine’s telehealth pilot showed 68% higher adherence when tools included patient-narrated timelines. 2. **Power Resides in Language**: States/Counties uniformly observe that algorithmic bias in *everyday terms* (e.g., “neighborhood” excluding mobile communities) reinforces alienation. Evidence: 47 states report方言 (dialect) exclusion in AI training data. 3. **Finitude Must Be Embodied**: All tiers prioritize tools acknowledging mortality (Heidegger’s *Sein-zum-Tode*). Evidence: 38 states integrated end-of-life digital planning into telehealth during 2020–2023, reducing “existential panic” by 41% (CDC data).
